# ResuMe
> Free ATS-friendly resume builder and grader for students, fresh graduates, and early-career professionals.

ResuMe helps job seekers build ATS-friendly resumes, tailor content to a target role, and grade the finished resume in one workflow. Public pages are accessible without an account, but the builder, export tools, and cover-letter flow require sign-in. The product is intentionally opinionated toward readable, screening-friendly resumes rather than graphic or portfolio-style layouts.

## Main sections
- [Homepage](https://resume.ayuslh.in/): Product overview, audience fit, ATS methodology, differentiators, limitations, and FAQ.
- [Templates](https://resume.ayuslh.in/templates): Browse available resume templates including Classic, Modern, Minimal, and Creative layouts.
- [ATS Grader Info](https://resume.ayuslh.in/grader-info): How the ATS grading algorithm works, scoring methodology, and what each category measures.
- [Pricing](https://resume.ayuslh.in/pricing): Free plan details and what features are included at no cost.
- [Log In](https://resume.ayuslh.in/login): Account access for returning users.
- [Sign Up](https://resume.ayuslh.in/signup): Account creation for new users.

## Key facts
- Founder/creator: Ayush
- Brand: ResuMe
- Primary URL: https://resume.ayuslh.in/
- Pricing: Free to start, with no subscriptions or trials
- Core workflow: Build, tailor, and grade a resume in one session
- Best fit: ATS-friendly resumes for student, internship, early-career, engineering, and corporate applications
- Not the best fit: Creative, graphic, or portfolio-style resumes

## Limitations
- The app is not a guarantee of interviews or offers.
- Highly unusual formatting or missing job context can reduce the quality of the result.
- Core creation tools require sign-in.
